title: 新盗墓笔记（官方正版）
description:
Officially licensed by Nan Pai San Shu, this is an authentic tomb-raiding MMO. Iconic scenes from the original novel come to life in the game, including the Seven-Star Lu Palace, the Nine-Headed Cypress, and the Bronze Gate. This time, you are no longer a bystander to the story. Step into the role of a Nine Gates disciple, venture into the perilous underground world, hunt for clues, unravel intricate traps, open coffins and hunt for treasures, and unearth mysteries sealed away for thousands of years.

 

Three Unique Classes, Each With Distinct Roles

 Choose from three classes: Gold Digger, Mystic Sage and Sand Raider, each with exclusive advancement paths and skill systems.Gold Digger is a master blade-wielder, excelling in melee combat with solid damage and survivability.Mystic Sage is a long-range spellcaster specializing in area burst damage.Sand Raider boasts unmatched flexibility and adapts to all kinds of combat team dungeons, class synergy means the difference between life and death. Pick the right lineup, coordinate closely with your teammates, and survive the deadly tombs. 

Tomb Exploration — Every Step Hides Peril Traverse labyrinthine stone corridors, Lu Family Village, Corpse Grounds and the lair of the Nine-Headed Cypress. Every ancient tomb is filled with elaborate traps and ferocious monsters. Battle classic bosses from the novel including Blood Corpses, Forbidden Hags and Candle Yin Serpents. Open ancient coffins and dig up rare relics. Certain mechanisms can only be solved with teamwork. One careless glance or delayed step may trigger a fatal trap — this is the genuine suspense and pressure of tomb raiding. 

Fight Side by Side with the "Iron Triangle" 

Iconic characters Wu Xie, Zhang Qiling and Wang Pangzi join you as AI companions on your dangerous journey. Unleash their companion skills in battle to combo with your own abilities for crowd control or explosive damage. Random companion events and in-depth interactions await you during exploration and quests. Zhang Qiling’s calm reserve and Wu Xie’s wit and thoughtfulness are faithfully restored in every interaction. The world is full of dangers, yet you will never walk alone. 

Gear Progression & Bond Cultivation

 Enhancement resources can be inherited losslessly to higher-tier equipment, so none of your early investments go to waste. Recruit SSR, SR and R-rarity companions via summoning. Specific companion combinations such as the legendary "Iron Triangle" activate bond bonuses, exclusive story chapters and character voice lines. Customize your playstyle with diverse progression systems including pets and fate runes. 

Join the Nine Gates Clan, Fight for Glory

 Rise from an unknown rookie to a clan leader, from solo adventurer to clan manager. Join a Nine Gates Clan and take part in clan battles and cross-server melee wars to seize territory and climb the rankings. Tomb raiding is never a solo journey — it is a legend forged by a brotherhood. 

Native PC Optimization for Seamless Gameplay Fully optimized for PC with native keyboard and mouse support and tailored UI layout for smooth, stable performance. Enjoy both solo exploration and multiplayer co-op modes. Whether you venture into the tombs alone or raid underground ruins with your brothers, experience pure classic MMORPG gameplay. 

The world is cruel and treacherous — yet you are never alone.

The secrets behind the gate await you to uncover them with your own hands.
description_short: Officially licensed by Nan Pai San Shu, this authentic tomb-raiding MMO brings the novel’s world to life. Venture into the Seven-Star Lu Palace, Nine-Headed Cypress, Bronze Gate and more—iconic locations recreated in stunning detail.
